desc: an inline-CALL handler under `.debounce(N)`/`.throttle(N)` is wrapped in a thunk so the FUNCTION is debounced, not its invoked void result (Spike-012 NEW-2 — react/solid pass a thunk to the helper; angular wraps a `this`-prefixed thunk in its IIFE); pre-fix `useDebouncedCallback(bump(), …)` invoked the handler (react/solid TS2345; angular emitted a free un-`this`-qualified `bump`)
